title: VortexMobs
description: Adaptive hostile mob AI that learns from player tactics and makes every fight smarter on Paper, Folia, Purpur, Spigot, and Fabric.
body:
# 🌪️ VortexMobs ### Hostile mobs that adapt to your server. No config. No scripts. No setup. **Paper • Folia • Purpur • Spigot • Fabric** [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Support-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/Tya84XrgSF) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Source-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/Sauron05/VortexMobs)
--- ## The idea Every Minecraft server eventually develops a meta. Players figure out that bows are safe. That height is an advantage. That shielding and burst damage make most encounters trivial. Once that happens, survival combat starts feeling like a routine chore instead of a real threat. VortexMobs was built to break that loop. It runs silently in the background, watching how fights actually end on your server. Over time it builds a server-specific combat profile and starts shaping mob behavior to push back against whatever your players rely on most. The result is a server where hostile mobs feel genuinely dangerous again — not because their numbers are bigger, but because they start responding to the way you play. --- ## What it actually does > When players consistently win at range → mobs close gaps faster and more aggressively > > When players exploit height → encounters become more punishing for terrain abuse > > When focus-fire melts fights instantly → mobs build sustained pressure instead > > When shielding is overused → the AI starts targeting that defensive habit None of this happens overnight. The brain builds over real encounters. The longer your server runs, the more precisely the AI reflects your community's playstyle back at it. --- ## Features | | Feature | What it does | |---|---|---| | 🧠 | **Adaptive Brain** | Persistent server AI built from real encounter data | | ⚔️ | **Tactic Pressure** | Mob behavior shaped around your dominant player habits | | 🏹 | **Anti-Kite Engine** | Gap-closing behavior that punishes ranged reliance | | 🛡️ | **Shield Cracking** | Counter-pressure against defensive repetition | | 🌪️ | **Dynamic Flow** | Encounters that stay unpredictable over time | | 👑 | **Adaptive Boss** | Boss that unlocks new abilities as the brain evolves | | 🚀 | **Multi-Platform** | Paper, Folia, Purpur, Spigot, and Fabric | | 🔓 | **Open Source** | Full source code on GitHub | --- ## Platform support | Platform | Version | Status | |---|---|---| | Paper / Purpur / Spigot | 1.21.x — 26.x | ✅ | | Folia | 1.21.x — 26.x | ✅ | | Fabric | 1.21.x | ✅ | | Fabric | 26.x | ✅ | --- ## Commands | Command | Description | |---|---| | `/vortexmobs brain` | View current server brain status | | `/vortexmobs spawnboss` | Spawn the adaptive boss | | `/vortexmobs resetbrain confirm` | Reset the server brain | | `/vortexmobs reload` | Reload configuration | --- ## Support development VortexMobs is completely free. If it is doing something useful for your server and you want to support future AI improvements, new adaptive behaviors, balance passes, and long-term polish — donations are welcome and always optional.
💛 **[Support on PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/ncp/payment/K74B94LS3YXNW)**
---
*The brain trains. The mobs adapt. The server pushes back.*
